title: Backend Developer Vacancy at KPIT Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at KPIT Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
KPIT Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About KPIT Technologies:
KPIT Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KPIT Technologies!
